headline: Ouster (OUST) Soars 14.4%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Ouster (OUST) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
